snippet.title: BEZ USTRUƒМAVANJA - Bo≈Њo PreleviƒЗ: U toku je obraƒНun izmeƒСu Aleksandra VuƒНiƒЗa i Neboj≈°e StefanoviƒЗa!
snippet.description:
Gost emisije вАЬBez ustruƒНavanjaвАЭ bio je advokat i nekada≈°nji ministar MUP-a, Bo≈Њo PreleviƒЗ koji je komentarisao hap≈°enje kriminalne grupe Veljka Belivuka i ukazao na dogaƒСaje prethodinih godina koji su ovu grupu povezivali sa aktuelnom vla≈°ƒЗu. Da li je poreƒСenje ovog klana sa Zemunskim opravdano i zbog ƒНega se toliko dugo ƒНekalo na njihovo hap≈°enje, ≈°ta nam govori vreme njihovog li≈°avanja slobode, zbog ƒНega su snimci sa mesta zloƒНina procureli u javnost i objavljivani u tabloidima i na televizijama, po reƒНima Bo≈Њe PreleviƒЗa, to govori o uni≈°tavanju i kriminalizovanju institucija. Kako komentari≈°e ostavke sekretara Dr≈Њavnog veƒЗa tu≈Њilaca Tome ZoriƒЗa, ali i Vladimira VuletiƒЗa sa mesta potpredsednika FK вАЭPartzianвАЭ, ali i saslu≈°anje nekada≈°njeg naƒНelnika KriminalistiƒНke policije Ilije MilaƒНiƒЗa, saznaƒЗete u emisiji. PreleviƒЗ je komentarisao i izbor Jasmine VasoviƒЗ za predsednicu Vrhovnog Kasacionog suda, ali i Zoru DobriƒНanin za ƒНlanicu Visokog saveta sudstva i Dr≈Њavnog veƒЗa tu≈Њilaca i podsetio da je ona branilac okrivljenih u aferi вАЬJovanjicaвАЭ. PreleviƒЗ smatra da ƒЗe zbog kriminalnih klanova reagovati i Evropa, jer prevazilaze okvire na≈°e zemlje, u emisiji ƒЗete takoƒСe moƒЗi da saznate zbog ƒНega smatra da nam je Francuska podr≈°ka ka Evropskoj Uniji, ali i zbog ƒНega je skeptik kada se govori o ubrzanom procesu ka prikljuƒНivanju i otvaranju novih klastera. HoƒЗe li se opozicija ujediniti, ≈°ta oƒНekuje od pregovora izmeƒСu vlasti i opozicije, zbog ƒНega je pomoƒЗ iz Evrope u pregovaranju neophodna i koja je uloga Skup≈°tine slobodne Srbije, vidi li ≈°ansu opozicije na narednim izborima, samo su neka od pitanja o aktuelnim politiƒНkim temama na koje je dao odgovor. Gost je ƒНestitao predsedniku Srbije Aleksandru VuƒНiƒЗu na vakcinaciji stanovni≈°tva, ali i izrazio zabrinutost zbog izuzetka empatije kod na≈°ih graƒСana zbog broja preminulih lekara usled pandemije i sa druge strane, kako ka≈Њe veƒЗ skoro godinu dana neometanog organizovanja kovid zabava.

snippet.title: Vladika Porfirije pjeva ƒНetniƒНke pjesme
snippet.description:
Novi patrijarh SPC-a Porfirije, do danas mitropolit zagrebaƒНko-ljubljanski osvanuo je prije pet godina na video snimku, kako u zanimljivom dru≈°tvu pjeva ƒНetniƒНku pjesmu posveƒЗenu ƒНetniƒНkom vojvodi MomƒНilu ƒРujiƒЗu, ratnom zloƒНincu iz Drugog svjetskog rata.

Snimak je navodno nastao prije pet godina u Chicagu.

- Nakon liturgije bio je ruƒНak i zabava, rekao sam Voji Bilbiji da otpjeva "na≈°u pjesmu", misleƒЗi na "Tamo daleko". On je poƒНeo pjevati pjesmu koju i ne znam i nekako sam pjevu≈°io za njima, malo iznenaƒСen ≈°to nije zapjevao onu koju sam mislio, pa sam u jednom trenutku i za≈°utio - pravdao se Porfirije u hrvatskim medijima rekav≈°i da je za≈°utio kada se pjevalo o "kokardi vojvode ƒРujiƒЗa".

Iz snimke se jasno vidi da je PeriƒЗ velik dio pjesme zaista opjevao, a veƒЗ od poƒНetka same pjesme jasno je da se radi o pjesmi ratne tematike s obzirom da se spominju "mitraljesci" i "granate".

- ≈†ta se ono na Dinari sjaji, ƒРujiƒЗeva kokarda na glavi - ka≈Њe sporni stih, a te≈°ko je procijeniti je li Porfirije zaista, kako tvrdi, prestao pjevati.

Pop MomƒНilo ƒРujiƒЗ ƒНetniƒНki je vojvoda i ratni zloƒНinac odgovoran za neke od najgnusnijih zloƒНina na ovim podruƒНjima u Drugom svjetskom ratu. ƒРujiƒЗevi ƒНetnici jedan od najveƒЗih pokolja napravili su u selu Gata u zaleƒСu Omi≈°a kada su 1.oktobra 1942. godine zvjerski poklali 95 civila.

Od kada je roƒСen pa do svoje smrti ƒРorƒСe Bala≈°eviƒЗ je bio sudbinski vezan za Vojvodinu. Snimio je 12 albuma i odr≈Њao bezbroj koncerata na kojima je pevao ali i pripovedao, uvek duhovito i zanimljivo, sa jasnim stavom na ƒНijoj je strani. PovlaƒСivao je samo svojoj publici, radio je to nesebiƒНno, nekritiƒНki i uporno. Zato su ga voleli i u Virovitici, Mariboru, ƒРevƒСeliji, Budvi, Tuzli...

snippet.title: Perseverance RoverвАЩs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Watch NASAвАЩs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover вАУ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space вАУ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAвАЩs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) вАУ our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceXвАЩs site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee вАУ approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipвАЩs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10вАЩs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceXвАЩs third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Monah Arsenije - Vladari iz senke ≈Њele poslu≈°ne zombije i obezbo≈Њene robove! (13.2.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je otac Arsenije JovanoviƒЗ, monah Srpske pravoslavne crkve i iguman manastira svetih apostola Petra i Pavle. Pro≈°ao je dug put od Senjaka, elitnog dela Beograda u kojem je odrastao i proveo deo mladosti, preko Ostroga, do manastira Ribnica kod Mionice, gde danas sa bratijom slu≈Њi Bogu. Kao mladiƒЗ, koji je u vreme osamdesetih вАЬimao sveвАЭ, a opet oseƒЗao neizrecivu prazninu i besmisao, bio je svedok tragiƒНne sudbine kruga vrhunskih umetnika, muziƒНara, slikara stare SFRJ koji su, zajedno sa njim, beg od tog istog besmisla potra≈Њili u jo≈° veƒЗem ni≈°tavilu. O ≈Њivotu pre mona≈°enja napisao je knjigu вАЬBog i rokenrolвАЭ, svedoƒНenje i uspomenu na preminule prijatelje i poznanike. Neki su mu zamerili, nekima je knjiga spasila ≈Њivot. Danas monah Arsenije odi≈°e nenametljivim mirom ƒНoveka koji je вАЬprobao sve i pro≈°ao svudвАЭ i na kraju se vratio u svoj dom, tamo gde je oduvek pripadao, a da toga u poƒНetku nije bio svestan. U kontaktu je sa mnogim mladim urbanim ljudima koji kod njega dolaze po savet, muƒНeni istim onim besmislom sa kojim se i sam kao momak borio. PreporuƒНujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate vi≈°e o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

snippet.title: Plazma torta sa milka ƒНokoladom, pojela se odmah pa sam ponovo pravila da bih vam uslikala presek.
snippet.description:
Nisam se nadala da ƒЗe u roku od pola sata ,,nestati"ove torte i da ƒЗu ostati bez preseka i slike (a bez toga vam ne mogu pustiti recept)..tako da sam je opet pravila, ≈°to je mojima savr≈°eno odgovaralo :)
Torta sa plazma keksom, milka ƒНokoladom i le≈°nicima. Odmah se pojela bez obzira ≈°to spada u one torte kojih je dovoljno jedno parƒНe. Korice su lagane od belanaca (nisu su≈°ene) i plazma keksa.
#milkatorta #plazmatorta #roƒСendansketorte
sveƒНane torte
torte sa korama
Recepte mo≈Њete ƒНitati na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/02/plazma-torta-sa-milka-cokoladom.html


Sastojci i priprema:
Kora:

- 5 belanaca
- 5 ka≈°ika ≈°eƒЗera
- 1,5 ka≈°ika bra≈°na
- 5 ka≈°ika mlevene plazme

3 - 4 ka≈°ike vode ili mleka za prelivanje peƒНenih kora

- 15 ≈Њumanaca
- 150 gr. ≈°eƒЗera
- 200 gr. maslaca ili margarina
- 100 gr. crne milka ƒНokolade
- 100 gr. bele milka ƒНokolade
- 200 gr. mlevene plazme
- 100 gr. mlevenih le≈°nika (lep≈°e ako su predhodno peƒНeni)

en.title: Cake with milk chocolate and ground biscuits, the best cake ever!
en.description:
#cake #chocolate #recipes
Ingredients and preparation:

Biscuit:
- 5 egg whites
- 5 tablespoons of sugar
- 1.5 tablespoons of flour
- 5 tablespoons ground biscuits

3-4 tablespoons of water or milk for topping baked biscuits

Prepare three biscuits.

Whisk egg whites and sugar. Stir in flour and ground biscuits. Bake in a preheated oven at 180 degrees for up to 20 minutes. Coat the baked biscuits with water or milk, 3-4 tablespoons is enough.

Cream:

- 15 egg yolks
- 150 gr. sugar
- 200 gr. butter or margarine
- 100 gr. dark milka chocolate
- 100 gr. white milk chocolate
- 200 gr. ground biscuits
- 100 gr. hazelnuts (better if pre-baked)
- 300 ml. whipped cream

Whisk the egg yolks with the sugar and cook on a steamer with a constant question, about 10 minutes.
Allow to cool. Meanwhile, melt the chocolate, whisk the butter. Whip the whipped cream.
Add 4 tablespoons of whipped cream to the filling, whisk.
Stir in hazelnuts and biscuits. Divide the filling into two parts, put melted dark chocolate in one part and melted white chocolate in the other part.

Fill the cake.
Biscuit, darker filling, whipped cream, biscuit, lighter filling, whipped cream, crust. Mix the rest of the fillings on top, I always leave a spoonful or two of filling and a little sweet sour cream. This is my filling with which I coat the third biscuit.
You can decorate with whipped cream or melted chocolate.
The cake must stand for one day in the refrigerator, cut and serve.
Enjoy !

snippet.title: Emanet 128. B√ґl√Љm Fragmanƒ± | Legacy Episode 128 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy

snippet.title: Game Recap: Nuggets 128, Bucks 97
snippet.description: Nikola Jokic recorded the 50th triple-double of his career as he tallied 37 points, 10 rebounds and 11 assists for the Nuggets as they defeated the Bucks, 128-97. Giannis Antetokounmpo recorded 27 points, eight rebounds and three assists for the Bucks in the losing effort. The Nuggets improve to 20-15 on the season, while the Bucks fall to 21-14.

Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

snippet.title: Zajedno imaju 130 godina
snippet.description:
Radoslav ƒРekiƒЗ iz Bugojna i njegova Zastava 1500 zajedno imaju 130 godina. Radoslav ima 88 a njegov automobil 42 godine. Kupio ga je davne 1979. godine u Zenici. Rade ka≈Њe da je u to vrijeme Zastavu vozio samo predsjednik opƒЗine Bugojno i rijetki pojedinci. Zastava je u odliƒНnom stanju. Njegov oldtimer nikada nije imao veƒЗi kvar da nije mogao voziti a za 42 godine pre≈°ao je 110000 kilometara. Danas ga rade provoza do svoga placa a prije nekoliko godina vozio se svojim ljubimcem i u Banjaluku. Iako ima dobrih ponuda da ga proda Radoslav jo≈° uvijek nije odluku o prodaji. Misli da ƒЗe to biti u ovoj godini. Mnogi mu ka≈Њu: "Vidi dobrog dede a jo≈° boljeg auta", ≈°ali se Rade. Pogledajte neobiƒНan video iz Bugojna.

snippet.title: MIC-MC-GOD MODE (OFFICIAL AUDIO)
snippet.description:
MIC-MC : https://www.instagram.com/micmc_93/

TEKST:

Koliko svez brate
vi morate da vezbate
jer repovati ne znate
sve znate,face su vam bez brate
sta je to u trendingu mora da me zezate
predahnem 

Ne mogu vise da gledam ova sranja,dranja,pomilovanja
imam nocne more sanjam

celija mozdana mi manja kazu mi da sam bog
bolje bi bilo bogu da se klanjas 

ne mogu stati ja dok ne dodje do klanja
jebeno lud evo mentalnog mi stanja 
eto me svud samo ganjam
vidi mi trud vidi kralja 
hejtere udarim preko glave poput thorovoga malja 

brate udarim kako valja,neko mi tamo obraz kalja 
habada babada babada babada govore glupi ljudi puni znanja
koliko repera trebam da pokidam da bi razumeli da sam budala
voli me svaki blok kraj stek voli me svaka mahala 
reperi za mene su sala meni je mikrofon taj alat
bolje mi bezi bre pedala,hteo bi feat neka hvala  
ne mogu tik tok repere,hip hop trepere para
ne mogu da mi plate pa se zapale izgore ko cigara
stivena sigala glume ala nemaju signala 
ponela ih slava dali za to deo svog anala
u Srbiji sam tata,kralj bog,eminem pa alah 
tako govore ljudi za mene pa mi previsoka skala 
ovo je odvod,prati moj hod UFO moj brod
ljudi su govna neki su manji govnima su pod rod
ja sam pro pro nisam propo moj kod 
10 dina ovde sada uso sam u GOD MOde


Malo mi treba da napadnem likove
moji mi govore ne veruj nikome 
pojedem barove snerove bitove 
ne moze niko da ponovi i to me 
zele kopirati praviti hitove
da li je moguce neko da skine me 
picke mekane face im vilene
oni bi hteli dole da vide me 

ne mogu dole da budem ja gorim 
i gorivo tera me jako da lomi
i repere volim kad leze u komi
a lirika zube im polomi boli 
ti bogovi pitaju kako postojim
i rogovi rastu mi sebe se bojim
jebe se meni da pobede brojim
propali ovi tu reperi tvoji

Za 10 godina nisam postigo ono sto ti si 

zabole me ono sto mi visi 

razlika izmedju mene i tebe 
kad ja repovo sam ti si tati u testisu bio samo orhitis-guglaj

U prevodu bio si bol u mudima
svako se pita na sta tacno ja aludiram 
ovo skola je za sve a oni mi uzina 
radis playback to ti je kao sebi da aplaudiras 
boii

Vidim dredove te furas glumac
nisi lil pump mozda mala pumpica za kurac
dm rejpujes mi nisam do sad video te buraz 
ni spomenuo pa ne znam zasto se tu guras

hoces clout vidim da si nula 
jebo mir hocu rat evo kozna frula
posto vidim bas si zapeo da duvas 
takve jebem vec odavno nemoj tu da mi se kurvas

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

On je uhapsio kriminalnu grupa za koju je postojala opravdana sumnja da je izvr≈°ila te≈°ka kriviƒНna grupa i ƒНiji je ƒНlan bio i sam njegov sin kojeg je evakuisao u Kostariku; a sve je to uradio i da se graƒСani Srbije ne bi bavili pravim problemima kao ≈°to je poskupljenje struje, nesta≈°ice hrane, nezaposlenost i sliƒНno.

VuƒНiƒЗ nije ƒНovek koji ima ovla≈°ƒЗenja da vodi sudske istrage, on samo mo≈Њe biti u pisanoj formi obave≈°ten o njihovom toku, ali ne i o svim detaljima jer takve istrage vodi Tu≈Њila≈°tvo za organizovani kriminal. 

TakoƒСe, policija ima prava samo da privede lice koje je zatekla u izvr≈°enju  kriviƒНnog dela. Lice se poziva na razgovor u policiju, a privodi se po nalogu tu≈Њioca koji ga saslu≈°ava. To su dva razliƒНita pravna stanja. ZnaƒНi, Kokeza je mogao biti pozvan na razgovor u policiji u svojstvu graƒСanina i da da izjavu; ili ispitivan u svojstvu osumnjiƒНenog i da ima pravo na advokata, a njemu tada mo≈Њe odrediti zadr≈Њavanje samo tu≈Њioc koji pokreƒЗe postupak, za Srbin.info rekao je u telefonskom razgovoru glavni odgovorni urednik magazina вАЮTabloidвАЭ, Milovan BrkiƒЗ, komentari≈°uƒЗi dana≈°nje, u nedelju 28. februara, privoƒСenje na informativni razgovor u policijsku stanicu prvog ƒНoveka Fudbalskog saveza Srbije (FSS), Slavi≈°e Kokeza.

- Pitanje tipa - da li je nameravao da smakne VuƒНiƒЗa - su pitanja koja pokazuju ≈°izofrenost onih koji ih postavljaju jer je normalno oƒНekivati da niko ≈Њiv ne bi rekao da je uƒНestvovao u takvim aktivnostima. Pogotovo ne ƒНovek tipa Slavi≈°e Kokeze. To ne znaƒНi da ja ovde branim Slavi≈°u Kokezu kao predsednika FSS i VuƒНiƒЗevog prijatelja i biznismena, veƒЗ govorim o graƒСaninu Kokezi koji ima pravo i da odbije poligraf, pogotovo kada imamo na umu da je  do skora glavni poligrafista bila Dijana HrkaloviƒЗ kod koje je na poligrafu pro≈°ao i Aleksandar VuƒНiƒЗ kada su ga pitali koliko je bogat, podsetio je BrkiƒЗ.

A ≈°ta je u vezi svega spomenutog rekao glavni odgovorni urednik magazina вАЮTabloidвАЭ poslu≈°ajte u video prilogu iznad, pa o svemu donesite svoj valjani sud.

Stavovi izneti u emisiji ili u prilogu nisu nu≈Њno stavovi redakcije SRBIN.info i CENTAR ili autora emisije.

snippet.title: The Nuggets might need to give up Jamal Murray to keep Nikola Jokic happy - Paul Pierce | The Jump
snippet.description:
Paul Pierce and Richard Jefferson join Rachel Nichols on The Jump to play "Panic or Patience?" for the Miami Heat, Toronto Raptors and the Denver Nuggets. 
0:00 Panic or Patience? for the Miami Heat
2:05 Jefferson says the Toronto Raptors need to give up assets moving forward.
4:32 Pierce says the Denver Nuggets should panic.
4:53 Pierce believes the Nuggets might need to give up Jamal Murray to get back into the top 4 in the Western conference and keep Nikola Jokic happy.

snippet.description:
U najnovijem izdanju emisije "Bez cenzure" gosti su bili predsednik Srpskog pokreta Dveri Bo≈°ko ObradoviƒЗ, ƒНlan Glavnog odbora Demokratske stranke SrƒСan MilivojeviƒЗ i biv≈°i policajac Milan DumanoviƒЗ. Tema emisije - "Partizanski narko bunker". Bo≈°ko ObradoviƒЗ smatra da je poslednja policijska akcija protiv kriminalne grupe Veljka Belivuka samo dokaz velikog razdora unutar vrha SNS-a. Svi su oni u nevolji zbog Velje Nevolje, tvrdi Bo≈°ko ObradoviƒЗ, jer je njegova grupa preuzela ju≈Њnu tribinu na Partizanovom stadionu uz pomoƒЗ sekretara Vlade Novaka NediƒЗa. Grupa Velje Nevolje je imala direktnu za≈°titu policija  koju je omoguƒЗila nekada≈°nja sekratarka MUP-a Dijana HrkaloviƒЗ sa kojom je Bo≈°ko ObradoviƒЗ imao okr≈°aj tokom lokalnih izbora u LuƒНanima jer je dovodila te batina≈°e da zastra≈°uju i opoziciju i graƒСane. Biv≈°i policajac Milan DumanoviƒЗ tvrdi da je Dijana HrkaloviƒЗ kadar SNS-a koji je preko Bratislava Ga≈°iƒЗa i kratkog zadr≈Њavanja u BIA preuzela poluge moƒЗi u MUP-u. DumanoviƒЗ upozorava da su veze policije sa organizovanim kriminalom izuzetno jake i da je neophodno da ovaj re≈Њim padne kako bi se procesuirali svi korumpirani policajci. snippet.title: DumanoviƒЗ: VuƒНiƒЗu, ƒНeka te ƒЗelija! GigiƒЗ: Istina o incidentu sa Andrejem VuƒНiƒЗem i Malim!
snippet.description:
Svedoci smo ophoƒСenja re≈Њima prema nepodobnima u raznim dru≈°tvenim sferama i delatnostima, a da to nisu samo ''incidenti'' veƒЗ praksa, govore i sluƒНajevi DumanoviƒЗa i GigiƒЗa.

Imate priliku da pogledate intervju biv≈°im pripadnika MUP-a Republike Srbije Milana DumanoviƒЗa (UKP) i Zlatka GigiƒЗa, biv≈°eg pripadnika ≈Њandarmerija. Poslu≈°ajte kako se VuƒНiƒЗev re≈Њim ophodi prema nepodobnima u MUP-u. DumanoviƒЗ i GigiƒЗ su inaƒНe i ƒНlanovi Pokreta OsloboƒСenje, taƒНnije deo su Saveta za borbu protiv kriminala.

Milan DumanoviƒЗ je biv≈°i pripadnik Uprave kriminalistiƒНke policije MUP-a Republike Srbije, koji je u svojstvu uzbunjivaƒНa uzbunio javnost, zajedno sa kolegom Mladenom TrboviƒЗem, o nelegalnim akcijama policije. Te akcije je su sprovoƒСenje po nareƒСenju Dijane HrkaloviƒЗ. DumanoviƒЗ i TrboviƒЗ, biv≈°i policajci Odeljenja za opservaciju i dokumentovanje, optu≈Њeni su jer su u medijima govorili o nezakonitim akcijama u kojima su uƒНestvovali. DumanoviƒЗ i TrboviƒЗ su zbog toga ostali bez posla, privedeni su, a kako se dalje razvijao sluƒНaj poslu≈°ajte u intervjuu.

Zlatko GigiƒЗ, biv≈°i pripadnik ≈Њandarmerije, inaƒНe uƒНesnik borbi na Kosovu i Metohiji, gde je i ranjavan, uƒНestvovao je u incidentu tokom Parade ponosa 2014. godina. Toga dana do≈°lo je do sukoba izmeƒСu obezbeƒСenja (Kobri) Andreja VuƒНiƒЗa, brata tada premijera Aleksandra VuƒНiƒЗa, i Predraga Malog, brata tada gradonaƒНelnika Sini≈°e Malog i pripadnika ≈Њandarmerije koji su obezbeƒСivali sam dogaƒСaj, kao dogaƒСaj od visokog rizika. ≈†ta se zaista toga dana dogodilo i kako je dalje tekao proces protiv grupe pripadnika ≈Њandarmerije i samog GigiƒЗa, poslu≈°ajte u ovom intervjuu.

Naglasak razgovora je bio na ophoƒСenju re≈Њima Aleksandra VuƒНiƒЗa prema onima koje prepozna kao nepodobne. Razgovora je bilo i o dana≈°njoj situaciji u policiji i ≈Њandarmeriji, strahu koji postoji kod GigiƒЗevih i DumanoviƒЗevih kolega, ali o poruci mladima koji planiraju da rade u MUP-u i da na taj naƒНin slu≈Њe graƒСanima i Republici Srbiji. 

DumanoviƒЗ ima i posebnu poruku za Aleksandra VuƒНiƒЗa i one koji su u kriminal ogrezli, a deo su re≈Њima.

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32вАЩ to tie at one and added two more in the 65вАЩ and 85вАЩ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70вАЩ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27вАЩ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports
